title: Release bee 1.1.0 — runtime-integrity hardening (1b downgrade fix + 1c honest drift)
action: Bump BEE_VERSION 1.0.0->1.1.0 across the release tuple (both state.mjs, both plugin.json), refresh split-brain fixture version pins, regenerate onboarding ledger + release manifest. Minor bump: 1b silent-downgrade bugfix + 1c honest drift with additive drift_detail. Reviewed (P1=0).

prohibitions: do not desync the release tuple
do not let templates/lib drift from .bee/bin/lib

verify: node scripts/test_release_tuple.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: bee 1.1.0 released: BEE_VERSION 1.0.0->1.1.0 across the release tuple, ledger+manifest regenerated, fixture pins refreshed. 11-suite green, tuple consistent, drift:false.
trace.verify_output: release tuple 1.1.0 consistent; lib_mirror 15 files identical; release_manifest --check 32 files match; full 11-suite green; status bee_version=plugin_version=1.1.0 drift:false
trace.verify_command: node scripts/test_release_tuple.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check
